scripts.test:metadata: echo 'Running Metadata GUI tests' && cucumber-js --config='' ../features/MovieMetadata_GUI.feature --import tsx --require 'tests/step_definitions/metadata-steps.ts'
scripts.test:player: echo 'Running Player GUI tests' && cucumber-js --config='' ../features/MoviePlayer_GUI.feature --import tsx --require 'tests/step_definitions/player-steps.ts'
scripts.test:login: echo 'Running Login GUI tests' && cucumber-js --config='' ../features/userlogingui.feature --import tsx --require 'tests/step_definitions/userLogin.steps.ts'
scripts.test:moviesmanagement: echo 'Running Movies Management Cypress' && cypress run --spec '../features/moviesmanagement_GUI.feature'
scripts.test:signup: echo 'Running SignUp State tests' && cucumber-js --config='' ../features/userSignUp.feature --import tsx --require 'tests/step_definitions/userSignUp-steps.ts'
